differential_diagnoses: Infective endocarditis with systemic septic embolization
Tick-borne disease (e.g., Rocky Mountain Spotted Fever)
next_steps: Perform urgent transesophageal echocardiography to evaluate for valvular vegetations
Send serum for antiphospholipid antibody panel (lupus anticoagulant, anticardiolipin, anti-beta2-glycoprotein I)
Measure serum ferritin, triglycerides, and soluble CD25 levels to evaluate for HLH
Submit blood and BAL samples for specialized cultures, including mycobacterial and fungal media
Perform peripheral blood smear review for schistocytes and infectious agents by an expert hematopathologist
Consult cardiology and infectious disease for evaluation of potential mycotic aneurysms vs. cerebral vasculitis
